mapper.select:
SELECT users.id AS id, users.type AS userType, users.first_name AS firstName, users.last_name AS lastName, users.username AS username, users.email AS email, users.address AS address, users.telephone AS telephone FROM users
WHERE users.is_active = 1
AND (users.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR users.telephone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
LIMIT #{page}, #{rowsPerPage}

SELECT users.id AS id, users.first_name AS firstName, users.last_name AS lastName, users.username AS username, users.telephone AS telephone, users.email AS email FROM users WHERE users.is_active = 1 AND users.id = #{userId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_code, first_name, last_name, username, email, password, created_by, created ) VALUES ( #{userCode}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{createdBy}, NOW() );
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, sex = #{gender}, dob = #{dateOfBirth}, telephone = #{telephone}, nationality = #{nationalityId}, address = #{address}, email = #{email}, signature_photo = #{signature}, modified = NOW(), modified_by = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `groups` WHERE is_active = 1 AND id IN (SELECT group_id FROM user_groups WHERE user_id = #{id});

SELECT branches.id, branches.name, user_branches.user_id AS userId FROM branches LEFT JOIN user_branches ON branches.id = user_branches.branch_id LEFT JOIN users ON user_branches.user_id = users.id WHERE user_branches.user_id = #{id};
SELECT id AS id, email AS email, username AS username, password AS password FROM users WHERE is_active = 1 AND username = #{username} LIMIT 01
mapper.delete: UPDATE users SET modified = NOW(), modified_by = 1, is_active = 2 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT branch_id FROM user_branches WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_code FROM users WHERE user_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY user_code DESC LIMIT 1
